overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza toward a megabuilding with holographic advertisements, then ascending a teal and orange staircase into an interior space. The scene features bright daylight, sparse pedestrian NPCs, and distinctive cyberpunk architecture with neon accents.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward the megabuilding with holographic advertisements

large leafy tree in a concrete planter
large leafy tree in a concrete planter with surrounding benches
green and yellow benches arranged around the tree planter
large digital advertising screen mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, sunlit pedestrian plaza in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward toward a massive megabuilding with a prominent holographic advertisement, passing trees and benches while glass skyscrapers rise on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza transition area with staircase entrance and overhead walkway

events.description: moving from open plaza into semi-covered area beneath the elevated walkway approaching the staircase

agents.ego_description: approaching the teal and orange staircase structure at the base of the megabuilding

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking near the staircase entrance

entered.detail: large dual staircase structure with teal sides and orange accents leading up to the building entrance
small yellow and blue security booth at the base of the stairs
covered pedestrian bridge crossing above the plaza at the building entrance level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered area as the camera approaches a distinctive teal and orange staircase. An elevated walkway crosses overhead, and a small yellow kiosk sits at the base of the stairs while the megabuilding looms closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway ascending into megabuilding interior

events.description: transitioning from walking on flat ground to ascending the staircase into the building

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs while passing other pedestrians descending from the interior

notable_agents.action: tattooed man in blue pants descending the stairs
woman in red pants and white jacket descending the stairs

entered.detail: dark entrance doorway at the top of the staircase leading inside the building
large digital screen visible above the stairwell showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the teal staircase into a covered interior space, passing pedestrians descending in the opposite direction. The environment becomes artificially lit and enclosed, with railings on both sides and a dark interior doorway visible at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a bright, open urban plaza into the enclosed, artificially lit interior of a massive megabuilding. It begins in a sunlit pedestrian square, gliding past trees and benches toward a towering structure dominated by a prominent holographic advertisement. As the camera approaches the building, the environment shifts into a semi-covered area beneath an elevated walkway, passing a small yellow kiosk at the base of a teal and orange staircase. The scene then transitions from the daylight of the plaza to a confined space as the camera ascends the stairs, passing descending pedestrians. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera enters a dark interior doorway, leaving the open city behind for a shadowed, enclosed corridor.
